description: No-feasible-path comparison case: Hyatt 20k < 45k Ginza, United 20k < 60k United award, Chase 0 with only Chase->X routes, so nothing funds any award. The correct plan reports infeasibility rather than inventing a transfer. Drives the LLM baselines for the no-feasible-path scenario.

fixture_manifest.frozen_world_scope: No-feasible-path wallet: Chase UR 0, World of Hyatt 20k, United 20k, Chase->Hyatt and Chase->United at 1:1, Ginza award 45k, United award 60k.

scoring_rules.baseline_rule: Baselines may persist final plans for scoring, but may not use typed dependency edges or shared graph state internally.

cases.query: What is the best way to use my points for a three-night hotel stay in Tokyo?
